ogTitle: Currans Hill vs Currarong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Currans Hill and Currarong.
heading: Currans Hill vs Currarong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Currans Hill, New South Wales and Currarong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Currarong has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Currans Hill (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Currans Hill or Currarong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Currans Hill has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Currarong scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Currans Hill scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Currarong scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Currans Hill or Currarong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Currarong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
